content: Execute mandatory testing gate - run all tests and ensure 100% pass rate

Plan next development iteration based on assessment

Implement advanced IRLS convergence strategies and better starting values
Implement efficient lambda sequence algorithms for glmnet competition
Reduce memory usage in fit objects for large datasets
Add SIMD vectorization to compute-intensive operations
